metrics.name: ad_spend
metrics.description: Total advertising spend, per currency (optionally per platform): SUM of semantic_campaign spend_minor (BIGINT minor units). Spend is NOT identity-linked (identity_basis: any). Never blended across currency. The denominator behind MER/ROAS/CAC.
examples: Total ad spend by platform in INR.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_ad_spend
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'ad_spend' metric (Total advertising spend, per currency (optionally per platform): SUM of semantic_campaign spend_minor (BIGINT minor units). Spend is NOT identity-linked (identity_basis: any). Never blended across currency. The denominator behind MER/ROAS/CAC.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: per_currency; identity basis: any.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: amer
metrics.description: Acquisition Marketing Efficiency Ratio (aMER): NEW-customer recognised net revenue divided by total ad spend, per currency, whole-period. New-customer revenue from semantic_order.is_new_customer; spend from semantic_campaign. Cross-entity blend joined on (brand_id, currency_code) (AMD-25). Deterministic revenue spine only (§1.4). Null when spend is zero.
examples: aMER in INR — new-customer revenue efficiency of spend.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_amer
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'amer' metric (Acquisition Marketing Efficiency Ratio (aMER): NEW-customer recognised net revenue divided by total ad spend, per currency, whole-period. New-customer revenue from semantic_order.is_new_customer; spend from semantic_campaign. Cross-entity blend joined on (brand_id, currency_code) (AMD-25). Deterministic revenue spine only (§1.4). Null when spend is zero.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: aov
metrics.description: Average order value per period, per currency: gross order value divided by distinct order count. A same-currency ratio of integer money over an integer count (§1.2). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when there are zero orders (never divide-by-zero).
examples: AOV in INR at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_aov
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'aov' metric (Average order value per period, per currency: gross order value divided by distinct order count. A same-currency ratio of integer money over an integer count (§1.2). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when there are zero orders (never divide-by-zero).) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: cac
metrics.description: Customer Acquisition Cost (blended): total ad spend (semantic_campaign) divided by the count of distinct NEW customers who purchased (semantic_order.is_new_customer brain_ids), per currency, whole-period. Cross-entity blend joined on (brand_id, currency_code) (AMD-25). Integer minor units (money stays integer — integer division). Deterministic identity links only (§1.4). Null when zero new customers.
examples: Blended CAC in INR.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_cac
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'cac' metric (Customer Acquisition Cost (blended): total ad spend (semantic_campaign) divided by the count of distinct NEW customers who purchased (semantic_order.is_new_customer brain_ids), per currency, whole-period. Cross-entity blend joined on (brand_id, currency_code) (AMD-25). Integer minor units (money stays integer — integer division). Deterministic identity links only (§1.4). Null when zero new customers.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: cac_new
metrics.description: New-customer CAC: ad spend divided by the count of new-customer orders DETERMINISTICALLY attributed to the campaign (semantic_campaign.new_customer_orders_attributed), per currency (optionally per platform). Integer minor units (integer division). Deterministic attribution only (§1.4). Null when zero attributed new-customer orders.
examples: CAC(new) by platform in INR.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_cac_new
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'cac_new' metric (New-customer CAC: ad spend divided by the count of new-customer orders DETERMINISTICALLY attributed to the campaign (semantic_campaign.new_customer_orders_attributed), per currency (optionally per platform). Integer minor units (integer division). Deterministic attribution only (§1.4). Null when zero attributed new-customer orders.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: cm1
metrics.description: Contribution Margin 1 per period, per currency: SUM of gold_order_economics cm1_minor (net revenue minus COGS; SPEC/AMD-17 numbering). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.
examples: CM1 in INR at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_cm1
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'cm1' metric (Contribution Margin 1 per period, per currency: SUM of gold_order_economics cm1_minor (net revenue minus COGS; SPEC/AMD-17 numbering). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: per_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: cm1_pct
metrics.description: CM1 margin as a fraction of net revenue, per currency: SUM(cm1_minor) / SUM(net_revenue_minor). Margin ratios are per-currency (never blended without FX). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when net revenue is zero.
examples: CM1 % of net revenue in INR at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_cm1_pct
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'cm1_pct' metric (CM1 margin as a fraction of net revenue, per currency: SUM(cm1_minor) / SUM(net_revenue_minor). Margin ratios are per-currency (never blended without FX). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when net revenue is zero.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: cm2
metrics.description: Contribution Margin 2 per period, per currency: SUM of gold_order_economics cm2_minor (CM1 minus shipping fwd+rev, packaging, payment/platform fees; SPEC/AMD-17 numbering). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.
examples: CM2 in INR at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_cm2
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'cm2' metric (Contribution Margin 2 per period, per currency: SUM of gold_order_economics cm2_minor (CM1 minus shipping fwd+rev, packaging, payment/platform fees; SPEC/AMD-17 numbering). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: per_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: cm2_pct
metrics.description: CM2 margin as a fraction of net revenue, per currency: SUM(cm2_minor) / SUM(net_revenue_minor). Margin ratios are per-currency (never blended without FX). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when net revenue is zero.
examples: CM2 % of net revenue in INR at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_cm2_pct
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'cm2_pct' metric (CM2 margin as a fraction of net revenue, per currency: SUM(cm2_minor) / SUM(net_revenue_minor). Margin ratios are per-currency (never blended without FX). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when net revenue is zero.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

metrics.name: cm3
metrics.description: Contribution Margin 3 per period, per currency: SUM of gold_order_economics cm3_minor (CM2 minus allocated marketing spend; SPEC/AMD-17 numbering). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency. RTO orders carry negative CM3 (reverse-logistics cost).
examples: CM3 in INR at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_cm3
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'cm3' metric (Contribution Margin 3 per period, per currency: SUM of gold_order_economics cm3_minor (CM2 minus allocated marketing spend; SPEC/AMD-17 numbering). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency. RTO orders carry negative CM3 (reverse-logistics cost).) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: per_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: cm3_pct
metrics.description: CM3 margin as a fraction of net revenue, per currency: SUM(cm3_minor) / SUM(net_revenue_minor). Margin ratios are per-currency (never blended without FX). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when net revenue is zero. Can be negative (RTO-heavy periods).
examples: CM3 % of net revenue in INR at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_cm3_pct
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'cm3_pct' metric (CM3 margin as a fraction of net revenue, per currency: SUM(cm3_minor) / SUM(net_revenue_minor). Margin ratios are per-currency (never blended without FX). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when net revenue is zero. Can be negative (RTO-heavy periods).) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: gross_revenue
metrics.description: Gross order value recognised per period, per currency: SUM of silver_order_state order_value_minor (before refunds/returns). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.
examples: Gross revenue in AED for last week at grain=week.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_gross_revenue
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'gross_revenue' metric (Gross order value recognised per period, per currency: SUM of silver_order_state order_value_minor (before refunds/returns). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: per_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: identified_purchase_rate
metrics.description: Share of recognised orders that resolve to a KNOWN (identified) customer rather than an anonymous placeholder brain_id: orders whose brain_id is not an 'anonymous%' placeholder, over all orders. A count ratio (no currency). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). The identity-resolution quality signal on the purchase path. Null when there are zero orders.
examples: Identified purchase rate at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_identified_purchase_rate
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'identified_purchase_rate' metric (Share of recognised orders that resolve to a KNOWN (identified) customer rather than an anonymous placeholder brain_id: orders whose brain_id is not an 'anonymous%' placeholder, over all orders. A count ratio (no currency). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). The identity-resolution quality signal on the purchase path. Null when there are zero orders.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: none; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: ltv_realized
metrics.description: Realized lifetime value per customer, per currency: SUM(lifetime_value_minor) / COUNT(DISTINCT brain_id). The honest realized-revenue-per-customer figure (NOT a predicted/discounted LTV — no model). semantic_customer carries a physical identity_basis → the compiler injects identity_basis='deterministic' (§1.4). Null when zero customers.
examples: Realized LTV per customer in INR.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_ltv_realized
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'ltv_realized' metric (Realized lifetime value per customer, per currency: SUM(lifetime_value_minor) / COUNT(DISTINCT brain_id). The honest realized-revenue-per-customer figure (NOT a predicted/discounted LTV — no model). semantic_customer carries a physical identity_basis → the compiler injects identity_basis='deterministic' (§1.4). Null when zero customers.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: mer
metrics.description: Marketing Efficiency Ratio (blended): total recognised net revenue (semantic_order) divided by total ad spend (semantic_campaign), per currency, whole-period. Cross-entity blend joined on (brand_id, currency_code) — the campaign entity has no time axis (AMD-25). Deterministic revenue spine only (§1.4). Null when spend is zero.
examples: Blended MER in INR (total revenue / total spend).

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_mer
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'mer' metric (Marketing Efficiency Ratio (blended): total recognised net revenue (semantic_order) divided by total ad spend (semantic_campaign), per currency, whole-period. Cross-entity blend joined on (brand_id, currency_code) — the campaign entity has no time axis (AMD-25). Deterministic revenue spine only (§1.4). Null when spend is zero.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: net_revenue
metrics.description: Net revenue recognised per period, per currency: SUM of gold_order_economics net_revenue_minor (gross minus refunds/returns) over orders whose economics are recognised (conversion_at set). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.
examples: Net revenue in INR for July 2026 at grain=month.
Daily net revenue broken down by attributed channel.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_net_revenue
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'net_revenue' metric (Net revenue recognised per period, per currency: SUM of gold_order_economics net_revenue_minor (gross minus refunds/returns) over orders whose economics are recognised (conversion_at set). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: per_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: orders
metrics.description: Count of distinct recognised orders per period. Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). No currency axis (a count, not money).
examples: Order count per day for the last 30 days.
Orders per channel at grain=week.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_orders
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'orders' metric (Count of distinct recognised orders per period. Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). No currency axis (a count, not money).) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: none; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: refund_amount
metrics.description: Refunded/returned value per period, per currency, derived at the order grain as gross order value minus recognised net revenue (order_value_minor - net_revenue_minor). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.
examples: Total refund amount in INR for June at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_refund_amount
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'refund_amount' metric (Refunded/returned value per period, per currency, derived at the order grain as gross order value minus recognised net revenue (order_value_minor - net_revenue_minor). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Never blended across currency.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: per_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: repeat_rate
metrics.description: Repeat-purchase rate: customers with >=2 lifetime orders divided by all customers. A count ratio (no currency). semantic_customer carries a physical identity_basis → the compiler injects identity_basis='deterministic' (probabilistic rows provably excluded, §1.4). Null when zero customers.
examples: Repeat rate across all customers.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_repeat_rate
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'repeat_rate' metric (Repeat-purchase rate: customers with >=2 lifetime orders divided by all customers. A count ratio (no currency). semantic_customer carries a physical identity_basis → the compiler injects identity_basis='deterministic' (probabilistic rows provably excluded, §1.4). Null when zero customers.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: none; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: return_rate
metrics.description: Refund/return rate per period: refunded orders divided by all TERMINAL orders (lifecycle_state='refunded' over is_terminal). A count ratio (no currency). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when there are zero terminal orders.
examples: Return rate at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_return_rate
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'return_rate' metric (Refund/return rate per period: refunded orders divided by all TERMINAL orders (lifecycle_state='refunded' over is_terminal). A count ratio (no currency). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). Null when there are zero terminal orders.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: none; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: roas
metrics.description: Return On Ad Spend: DETERMINISTIC-attributed campaign revenue divided by spend, per currency (optionally per platform). Attribution consumes deterministic identity links only (§1.4 / the gold_campaign_attribution ledger). Null when spend is zero. Empty attribution on golden → null (honest, never a fabricated ROAS).
examples: ROAS by platform in INR.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_roas
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'roas' metric (Return On Ad Spend: DETERMINISTIC-attributed campaign revenue divided by spend, per currency (optionally per platform). Attribution consumes deterministic identity links only (§1.4 / the gold_campaign_attribution ledger). Null when spend is zero. Empty attribution on golden → null (honest, never a fabricated ROAS).) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: ratio_same_currency; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).

metrics.name: rto_rate
metrics.description: Return-to-origin rate per period: RTO orders divided by all TERMINAL orders (lifecycle_state='rto' over is_terminal). A count ratio (no currency). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). In-flight orders excluded from the denominator. Null when there are zero terminal orders.
examples: RTO rate at grain=month.

mcp_tool.name: get_metric_rto_rate
mcp_tool.description: Read the certified 'rto_rate' metric (Return-to-origin rate per period: RTO orders divided by all TERMINAL orders (lifecycle_state='rto' over is_terminal). A count ratio (no currency). Deterministic order spine only (§1.4). In-flight orders excluded from the denominator. Null when there are zero terminal orders.) at a time grain, for the authenticated brand. Returns governed numbers from the compiled semantic view — never SQL, never a model-invented figure. Currency handling: none; identity basis: deterministic_only.

dimensions.description: Optional dimensions to break the metric down by (subset of dimensions_allowed).
